name: Princess Donut
description: A pampered long-haired tortoiseshell Persian show cat with fluffy black, beige and white fur, a flat expressive face, and large eyes. Regal, haughty posture. As a crawler she can speak and is unnervingly intelligent.
referencePrompt: Neutral standing reference of Princess Donut: a fluffy tortoiseshell Persian show cat (black, beige and white fur), sitting upright with a haughty regal expression, large eyes.
notes: She is Carl's ex-girlfriend's award-winning show cat (full name 'GC, BWR, NW Princess Donut the Queen Anne Chonk'). From chapter 7 she wears a cat-sized jeweled tiara (the Enchanted Crown of the Sepsis Whore). Fur is tortoiseshell per the book text, not orange.
